name: <your_name>
title: <your_title>
summary:
Platform Engineering and DevOps Architect with 15+ years of experience designing, operating, and improving large-scale distributed systems across cloud and enterprise environments.

Strong background in Kubernetes, multi-cloud platforms, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, observability, and security-focused operations, with growing expertise in AI/ML systems, MLOps, API-driven automation, and production AI platforms.

Experienced in building production-grade platforms that improve developer velocity, reliability, scalability, and operational resilience for data-intensive and business-critical workloads.

skills.AI / ML Systems & MLOps: LLM inference workflows, model deployment pipelines, AI system automation, API integrations, agentic workflow foundations, data workflows, monitoring
skills.Cloud & Distributed Systems: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Terraform, scalable distributed systems
skills.Containers & Cluster Management: Docker, Kubernetes (production), Helm, GitOps, container platforms
skills.Platform Engineering & Developer Experie: Platform engineering, internal platforms, developer enablement, release workflows, environment automation
skills.DevOps & CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, CI/CD automation, deployment reliability
skills.Observability, Reliability & Security: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Loki, monitoring, alerting, incident response, DevSecOps
skills.Infrastructure & Networking: Cloud networking, scalable systems design, distributed architectures, infrastructure as code

bullets: Designed Grafana-based CI observability across AWS and GCP, enabling proactive monitoring of build latency, queue wait times, agent utilisation, and network bottlenecks — shifting CI operations from reactive firefighting to data-driven optimisation

Built an Agentic AI-driven L1 support system to analyse CI alerts and build logs, auto-classify recurring failures, and recommend resolutions — significantly reducing manual triage and improving MTTR across cloud-hosted pipelines

Led CI performance optimisation across 5 repositories x 5 plans (25 executions), saving ~42.5 minutes per repo per cycle and reclaiming ~212 minutes (~3.5 hours) of CI agent capacity per full end-to-end execution

Driving large-scale migration from Bamboo to Jenkins across AWS and GCP, covering 2,744 plans, 169K+ branches, 248K+ builds, 1.18M+ jobs, and 69K+ metrics — designing phased migration, parallel-run strategy, and pipeline-as-code architecture
Architected Kubernetes-based platform serving 20+ enterprise applications across AWS and GCP, supporting 200+ developers with 99.9% uptime
Designed cloud-native CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI, reducing deployment cycle time by 40% and enabling 50+ production deployments per week
Built self-service platform tooling that cut environment provisioning time from hours to under 10 minutes, improving developer velocity across 8 product teams
experience.tools: AWS, GCP, Terraform, Ansible, YAML, Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab, Git, Bash, Python

projects.name: Resume Updater & Cover Letter Generator
projects.description: Built an AI-powered CLI tool that takes a Job Description as input, tailors a resume, and generates a cover letter as compressed PDFs. Uses the Hugging Face Inference API with the Qwen2.5-72B LLM, plus automatic keyword-matching fallback. Features company name auto-detection, ATS audit reporting, professional PDF rendering via ReportLab, and dual-mode operation (AI + offline).
projects.tools: Python, Hugging Face Inference API, Qwen LLM, ReportLab, NLP, PDF Generation
